summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SmartWorld Analytics portal. Backend APIs fully functional, frontend navigation and core features working. Charts have rendering issues due to container sizing.

ui_bugs.issue: All charts showing width/height -1 error, not rendering properly
ui_bugs.details: Charts using Recharts library have container sizing issues. Multiple console errors: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0'

ui_bugs.issue: HTML validation warning - span inside option elements causing hydration error
ui_bugs.details: React hydration error due to invalid HTML structure in filter dropdown options

passed_tests: All 9 backend API endpoints working correctly
Landing page loads with hero section and stats bar
Upload page loads with drag-drop zone

success_percentage.frontend: 85% - Core functionality works, charts not rendering

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix chart rendering issues in dashboard components. Charts are not displaying due to container sizing problems with ResponsiveContainer. All chart components (MonthlyTrend, PlantBar, WBSPie, etc.) affected. Also fix HTML validation warning in filter dropdowns.
